description: CompositionBlack round neck t-shirt made of 100% Dri-Fit polyester, has short sleeves, ribbed neckline and nike swoosh on the left chest FitRegularWash careMachine wash with warm water of 40 degreesWash inside out with like coloursDo not bleach or iron on printDry in shadeThis t-shirt from nike for men is for the man of sport who prefers a basic and comfy style while training. The dri-fit technology wicks sweat away from your body to ensure maximum comfort while on the field. Wear this with denims, a tee and casual shoes, or with track pants and sport shoes.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
